literature.title: CO Spillover Is Not a Promoter for C─C Bond Formation in CO2 Electroreduction on Cu‐Ag Bimetallic Catalysts
literature.authors: Beining Xu Zhaochun Liu Xinjuan Du Wen Yan Yunsong Yu Ionut Tranca Frederik Tielens Ming Ma
literature.extraction_method: Text and structure extracted via opendataloader-pdf; figure data read from extracted images (bar charts).

material.name: Cu-Ag bimetallic catalyst (0.2 mm Cu / 0.2 mm Ag stripes)
material.notes: ~45 nm thick Cu layer deposited on gas diffusion electrode via DC magnetron sputtering (50 W). Ag stripes deposited through deposition masks with slit width = shield width = 0.2 mm. Cu stripe width: 0.2 mm. Ag stripe width: 0.2 mm. Corresponding interface density: 50 cm-2. Equal total surface areas of Cu and Ag across all samples.

facility.laboratory: School of Chemical Engineering and Technology, Xi'an Jiaotong University, Xi'an, P. R. China

instrument.notes: Gas products: online_GC; Liquid products: HPLC

processing.notes: Faradaic efficiencies from online GC (gas products) and HPLC (liquid products) at galvanostatic steady state. Water crossover correction applied for liquid product quantification.

qc.evidence: Peer-reviewed publication (Advanced Science, 2026). Error bars from multiple measurements visible in Figure 4a.

links.notes: Same Cu-Ag catalyst (0.2 mm Cu/Ag stripes) tested under CO2RR conditions.

generated_by.notes: PDF structure extracted by opendataloader-pdf (markdown + JSON with bounding boxes). Metadata fields parsed from extracted text. FE values read from extracted figure images.

descriptors.name: faradaic_efficiency.H2
descriptors.definition: Faradaic efficiency for Hydrogen (H2) production during CORR at 200 mA/cm2.

descriptors.name: faradaic_efficiency.CH4
descriptors.definition: Faradaic efficiency for Methane (CH4) production during CORR at 200 mA/cm2.

descriptors.name: faradaic_efficiency.C2H4
descriptors.definition: Faradaic efficiency for Ethylene (C2H4) production during CORR at 200 mA/cm2.

descriptors.name: faradaic_efficiency.CH3COO
descriptors.definition: Faradaic efficiency for Acetate (CH3COO-) production during CORR at 200 mA/cm2.

descriptors.name: faradaic_efficiency.C2H5OH
descriptors.definition: Faradaic efficiency for Ethanol (C2H5OH) production during CORR at 200 mA/cm2.

descriptors.name: faradaic_efficiency.C3H7OH
descriptors.definition: Faradaic efficiency for n-Propanol (C3H7OH) production during CORR at 200 mA/cm2.

descriptors.name: faradaic_efficiency.total_C1
descriptors.definition: Total Faradaic efficiency for C1 products (CH4) during CORR.

descriptors.name: faradaic_efficiency.total_C2plus
descriptors.definition: Total Faradaic efficiency for C2+ products (C2H4 + CH3COO- + C2H5OH + C3H7OH) during CORR.

descriptors.name: faradaic_efficiency.ratio_CH4_to_C2plus
descriptors.definition: Ratio of FE(CH4) to FE(total C2+) during CORR. Quantifies relative selectivity shift from C-C coupling to CO hydrogenation at the Cu-Ag interface.
